<!--
Thank you for contributing to gridplay! Please fill out the sections below so
reviewers can understand and verify your change quickly.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor:`)
- [ ] CI / build (`ci:` / `build:`)
- [ ] Chore / other (`chore:`)

## Linked issues

<!-- Closes #123, Refs #456 -->

## How has this been tested?

<!-- Commands run, scenarios exercised, screenshots for UI changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `pytest` passes.
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass.
- [ ] `mypy .` passes (if touching backend code).
- [ ] New/changed behavior is covered by tests.
- [ ] Docs updated if user-visible.
